dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) close near r1 (upper end of range), (2) open at similar level to previous high, (3) red candle (negative body), (4) confluence at r1 level. Stop-loss set at 50 pips (~0.05%) from entry range 9,630-9,640. Exit targets previous low (s1). The 20MA/50MA confluence is implicit in the pivot levels used. Regime is RANGING per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) close near r1 (upper end of range), (2) open at similar level to previous high, (3) red candle (negative body), (4) confluence at r1 level. Stop-loss set at 50 pips (~0.05%) from entry range 9,630-9,640. Exit targets previous low (s1). The 20MA/50MA confluence is implicit in the pivot levels used. Regime is RANGING per signal specification.

source_rule_text: Sell from the top end of a range when price closes near the upper end after a failed breakout attempt and opens at similar levels with weakness, targeting the previous low.
